title: In-app feedback collection (per-message thumbs + session feedback card)
description: Add two feedback mechanisms: (1) thumbs up/down on each bot response for granular coaching quality signal, (2) one-time inline feedback card after user's 8th message for holistic session feedback. Store in Supabase feedback table. View data via Supabase Table Editor.
acceptance_criteria: Thumbs up/down icons appear on hover for each bot message
Clicking thumb saves rating to feedback table with message_id and conversation_id
Inline feedback card appears after user's 8th message in a conversation
Feedback card has thumbs up/down + optional free-text field
Feedback card only shows once per conversation
feedback table exists in Supabase with correct schema
All feedback visible in Supabase Table Editor

context.notes: Two-tier feedback: passive per-message thumbs + active session card at message 8. No modals. Inline chat card only.
